pr.title: A.8: gitignore .aider.* runtime artifacts
pr.body:
Add .aider.chat.history.md, .aider.input.history, .aider.tags.cache.v4/,
and the generic .aider* glob to the repo .gitignore so aider's session
state stops showing up in git status after a --worker aider --apply run.

These are aider's own runtime side-artifacts (chat transcript, input
history, source tag cache), not ai-cockpit output. The dirty-tree
pre-check from A.7 already keeps them out of the way at run time; this
PR keeps them out of git tracking entirely.

Per ROADMAP §A.8 contract: 2 files, 20 net LOC, no AiderWorker change,
no auto-cleanup. Documented under README 'Coder worker (v0.3 step 2)'.

Pre-push: pytest 139 passed, ruff clean, mypy . clean (44 files),
ai-cockpit smoke --dry-run --llm none --no-checkpoint renders summary.

Co-authored-by: nanyang12138 <nanyang12138@users.noreply.github.com>
pr.author: github-actions[bot]
